index.head.title: froelen's website
index.head.description: Get to know froelen, a computer science student, and discover his works.
index.head.og:title: froelen's wesbite - Computer Science student
index.head.og:description: Discover who I am and what I do.
index.content-intro-main:
Computer science student learning through a mix of courses and self-teaching.
Currently learning: Python, HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Interested in: Java, Rust
index.content-intro-links: Click here for my social profiles!
index.pf.website: My personel website, which you're browsing right now!
index.pf.ssg: A self-made SSG helping me to make this website.
index.pf.battle: A self-playing battle cards game made to learn OOP.
index.pf.pycraft: The biggest team-project I've done: a Terraria-inspired sandbox game.
index.pf.doa8bw: A Minecraft mod based on the Diary of 8-Bit Warrior book series. Actively developed with team Minus
index.pf.wiki: The herculean task of writing a wiki all by myself.
index.pf.cheat-sheets: Self-made simplified cheat sheets of CSS (HTML/JS planned) made on the go.
index.supporters-thanks: Many thanks to everyone supporting me:

links.body-oled-disclaimer: OLED mode is experimental! Some features may be buggy, or elements may disappear.
links.body-top-about: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, but today is a gift. That is why it is called the present.
links.body-footer-note:
This webpage is a personal project of the website's owner (froelen). You may find its code at its repository for inspiration. Please credit the original work if you end up reusing some assets.
Credits to HelmiP, Mozilla FireFox, and PrimeTek: see here.
